description: 卡片式照片整理工具，支持全部照片、相簿和截图筛选，左右滑切换照片，上下滑待删、收藏标记和移动到相簿。
name: PhotoSlide

localizedDescriptions.en: A card-style photo cleanup tool with all-photo, album, and screenshot filters. Swipe left or right to switch between photos, swipe up or down to queue deletion, mark favorites, and move photos into albums.
localizedDescriptions.zh: 卡片式照片整理工具，支持全部照片、相簿和截图筛选，左右滑切换照片，上下滑待删、收藏标记和移动到相簿。
